overview: StudyFlow is a student study planner demonstrating core Java concepts — Collections sorting, HashMap grouping, Enums, and OOP patterns. Features a daily schedule generator, priority queue visualization, subject leaderboard, and task statistics panel.
features: Daily schedule generator using priority-based sorting (Comparator pattern)
Priority Queue visualization showing top tasks by deadline urgency and difficulty
Subject Performance Leaderboard ranked by completion percentage
Task Statistics panel grouping tasks by status (HashMap grouping concept)
Focus session management with Pomodoro tracking
Analytics with 7-day focus score history and per-subject charts
In-memory data storage with Java Collections patterns
Clean student-friendly UI with readable contrast and visible labels
